title: Tom Yum Pork Soup
description: A spicy and sour Thai soup made with pork, lemongrass, and mushrooms. Serve hot with steamed rice for a flavorful and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Lemongrass, bruised
ingredients.notes: Use the white and light green parts

ingredients.name: Tom Yum soup paste
ingredients.notes: Find in most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: Red chili peppers, sliced
ingredients.notes: Use more or less to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add pork and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add lemongrass, mushrooms, and soup paste. Cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Pour in water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in fish sauce, sugar, and lime juice. Season with salt to taste.
Add Thai basil and red chili peppers. Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Thai basil and red chili peppers if desired.
